title: Only one with V1_ROOM_CONSTITUTION.md
public_claim: Only one with V1_ROOM_CONSTITUTION.md is a room handoff for this is the "v1" continuation-ready bundle — a tight 18-file package that self-describes as "a clean continuation layer on top of the preserved replacement archive." Its differentiator among siblings: it introduces the "V1 Room Constitution" document (not present in any other 04-11 sibling) — an attempt to codify the room's governing.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
